speaker: Philip:
en: And give her a teaspoon of the medicine after every meal. Don't worry. She'll be fine. You're welcome. Good-bye.
cn: 每餐之后给她吃一茶匙的药，不要担心，她会好的。不用谢，再见。

speaker: Ellen:
en: How are you?

speaker: Philip:
en: I'm tired and hungry.

speaker: Ellen:
en: Well, Marilyn and Richard called. They'll be here soon, and then we'll eat.
cn: 好啦，Marilyn和Richard打电话来了。他们马上就到。他们一到就开饭。

speaker: Philip:
en: All right. Is...is Susan coming?

speaker: Ellen:
en: Well, she'll be here later. She has to work late tonight.
cn: 她会晚一点。她今晚得工作得晚一些。

speaker: Philip:
en: And what's Robbie cooking for dinner?

speaker: Ellen:
en: It's a surprise.

speaker: Philip:
en: I hope it's pasta.
cn: 我希望是意大利通心粉。

speaker: Philip:
en: Robbie, the dinner was terrific.

speaker: Susan:
en: Yes, it was delicious.

speaker: Marilyn:
en: What's for dessert?

speaker: Robbie:
en: Oh, I forgot dessert.

speaker: Philip:
en: Robbie!

speaker: Ellen:
en: Don't worry. We've got lots of ice cream.
cn: 没什么，我们有好多冰淇淋呢。

speaker: Richard:
en: Oh, I'd love some ice cream.

speaker: Ellen:
en: Well, there's chocolate and coffee and a little vanilla.
cn: 好的,这儿有巧克力冰淇淋, 咖啡冰淇淋和一点香草的。

speaker: Robbie:
en: I'll have vanilla. Is that all right with everyone?
cn: 我要香草的，各位有意见吗?

speaker: Philip:
en: I'll have chocolate.

speaker: Marilyn:
en: Me, too.

speaker: Richard:
en: Uh, one scoop of coffee and one scoop of chocolate for me.
cn: 我要一勺咖啡的和一勺巧克力的。

speaker: Ellen:
en: Robbie, will you help me serve?

speaker: Richard:
en: I keep thinking about that bag of film. Eight rolls. A whole day's work. And good stuff, too.
cn: 我一直在想着旅行袋的事。一共有八卷。一整天的成果呀。而且都很精采。

speaker: Ellen:
en: Don't worry, Richard. Somenoe will find it.
cn: 别担心, Richard。有人会发现它的。

speaker: Robbie:
en: I'll get it.

speaker: Robbie:
en: Hello.

speaker: Alexandra:
en: Hello. Does Richard Stewart live here?

speaker: Robbie:
en: Yes, he's my brother. I'm Robbie...Robbie Stewart.
cn: 是的，他是我哥哥。我叫Robbie...Robbie Stewart。

speaker: Alexandra:
en: I'm Alexandra Pappas. How do you do?

speaker: Alexandra:
en: Your brother left his bag of film on the ferryboat. I found it.
cn: 你哥哥将他的旅行袋遗忘在渡船上了。我发现了它。

speaker: Robbie:
en: I'm really glad to see you. I mean...my brother'll be really glad to see you!
cn: 非常高兴见到你。我的意思是...我哥哥见到你会非常高兴。

speaker: Ellen:
en: Robbie! Who is it?

speaker: Robbie:
en: It's Richard's film! I mean, Alexandra Pappas.

speaker: Robbie:
en: Come in, please.

speaker: Richard:
en: Alexandra!

speaker: Alexandra:
en: Hello, Richard. I found your bag!
cn: 你好, Richard。 我捡到你的旅行袋。

speaker: Richard:
en: Oh, thank you! Thank you! Um...Alexandra, let me introduce you. This is my wife Marilyn.
cn: 哦,谢谢, 谢谢!噢……Alexandra,让我介绍一下。这是我太太Marilyn。

speaker: Alexandra:
en: Richard showed me your photo. How do you do?
cn: Richard给我看了你的照片。你好。

speaker: Marilyn:
en: Oh yes. Richard told us all about you. It's nice to meet you.
cn: 哦。Richard跟我们谈起你。很高兴见到你。

speaker: Richard:
en: And this is my mother, Ellen Stewart.

speaker: Alexandra:
en: How do you do?

speaker: Richard:
en: And my father, Dr. Philip Stewart.

speaker: Philip:
en: Nice to meet you, Alexandra.

speaker: Richard:
en: And...ah...you met Robbie.

speaker: Alexandra:
en: Yes. And you must be Susan.
cn: Hi. 是的。那你一定是Susan了,你好。

speaker: Susan:
en: Hi. Welcome.

speaker: Richard:
en: I'm so glad you found the bag and took the time and trouble to return it.
cn: 我很高兴你发现了旅行袋而且不怕麻烦,花时间将它送来。

speaker: Alexandra:
en: Oh, it was no trouble. I just took the wrong train.
cn: 哦,没什么麻烦。只是我坐错了车。

speaker: Ellen:
en: Would you like something to eat?

speaker: Alexandra:
en: Thank you, no. I'm late for dinner at my house. I really have to go.
cn: 谢谢, 不用了。我回家吃晚饭要迟到了。我真的得走了。

speaker: Richard:
en: Would you like to call home?
cn: 你想跟家里通个电话吗?

speaker: Alexandra:
en: I'd appreciate that.

speaker: Ellen:
en: Please, use the phone.

speaker: Alexandra:
en: Thanks. Excuse me.

speaker: Richard:
en: Alexandra's a high-school exchange student from Greece.
cn: Alexandra是从希腊来的交换高中生。

speaker: Robbie:
en: Where does she live?

speaker: Richard:
en: With a family in the Bronx.

speaker: Robbie:
en: Oh, that's not too far from here!

speaker: Richard:
en: Take it easy, Robbie.

speaker: Alexandra:
en: Thank you. I can only stay a few minutes.
cn: 谢谢。我只能停留几分钟。

speaker: Ellen:
en: Have some iced tea.

speaker: Alexandra:
en: Thanks, Mrs. Stewart.

speaker: Robbie:
en: Please sit down, Alexandra.

speaker: Philip:
en: So, you're an exchange student. Where do you go to school?
cn: 哦,你是一名交换学生。在哪儿上学?

speaker: Alexandra:
en: At the Bronx High School of Science.

speaker: Philip:
en: Oh, that's a very good school. What are your favorite subjects?
cn: 哦,那是个好学校。喜欢哪些课程?

speaker: Alexandra:
en: Biology and mathematics. Richard tells me you're a doctor.
cn: 生物学和数学。Richard告诉我您是医生。

speaker: Philip:
en: Yes, a pediatrician. And what does your father do?
cn: 是的,小儿科医生。令尊是做什么的?

speaker: Alexandra:
en: He's a lawyer, in Thessaloniki.

speaker: Robbie:
en: Would you like some pasta? I made it myself. It might be a little cold.
cn: 你想不想来点意大利通心粉？我自己做的。可能有点凉了。

speaker: Alexandra:
en: Thanks, no. I do have to go. It was nice meeting you all.
cn: 谢谢,不用了。我真的得走了。很高兴见到你们一家。

speaker: Marilyn:
en: Well, maybe you'll come for lunch some Sunday, so we can really thank you for bringing Richard's bag back.
cn: 既然如此,或许哪个星期天能来吃中饭。让我们好好的感谢你送回Richard的旅行袋。?

speaker: Alexandra:
en: Maybe.

speaker: Ellen:
en: You're welcome anytime.

speaker: Philip:
en: Good-bye.

speaker: Richard:
en: Can I drive you home?

speaker: Alexandra:
en: No, thanks. The train is just up the street. It won't take me long at all.
cn: 不用了,谢谢。地铁就在街的那一头。不需要花很长时间的。

speaker: Richard:
en: Well, you really saved the day for me, Alexandra.
cn: 你真的帮了我一个大忙,Alexandra。

speaker: Alexandra:
en: Bye.

speaker: Richard:
en: Bye-bye.

speaker: Ellen:
en: Good night.

speaker: Philip:
en: She's a smart young lady, and very nice.
cn: 她是个聪明的年轻姑娘,而且很善良。

speaker: Robbie:
en: Very! Hey, she forgot her bag!
cn: 十分！ 嘿,她忘了她的包！

speaker: Ellen:
en: I guess we'll be seeing Alexandra again. Right, Robbie?
cn: 我想我们不久又将见到Alexandra。对吧,Robbie?
